texto: You are not an "author," you are a writer. If your books are still selling like hotcakes ten years after your demise, THEN you're an author.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a H.P. Oliver: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “You are not an "author," you are a writer. If your books are still selling like hotcakes ten year…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, writing-craft, author pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: During 30 years of earning my daily bread as a writer I have learned many lessons about our craft. The most significant of those lessons is that I still have many lessons to learn about out craft.
explicacao: Citação de H.P. Oliver sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “During 30 years of earning my daily bread as a writer I have learned many lessons about our craft…” articula reflexao, writing-craft, lessons em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
